subject: [PATCH v2 24/28] nfsd: add a fi_connectable flag to struct nfs4_file

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a new flag to the nfs4_file structure called fi_connectable, which indicates whether a filehandle should be encoded as connectable or not. The flag is set based on whether subtree checking is enabled for the export under which a directory delegation was acquired. This change is necessary when encoding a filehandle for a CB_NOTIFY operation where no svc_export is available.
